source.title: Beyond Advertising: Mechanism Design for Platform-Wide Marketing Service QuanZhanTui - SSRN/ACM KDD 2025

extractions.claim: QuanZhanTui is a novel platform-wide marketing system where merchants bid for impressions across ALL traffic (organic + paid), not just ad slots. Published as academic paper at ACM KDD 2025.
extractions.evidence: QuanZhanTui enables sellers to bid for impressions across the platform's entire traffic, directly influencing platform-wide sales while keeping user experience uncompromised. The system uses a 'Liquid Payment Auction' (LPA) mechanism that optimizes balanced objectives between merchant welfare and user experience. This represents a paradigm shift from traditional ad-only bidding to a platform-wide impression system.

verification.verifier_notes: Peer-reviewed academic paper at ACM SIGKDD 2025. Authors appear to be PDD/Temu engineers and collaborating academics.

extractions.claim: PDD's RMB 100 billion merchant support program launched in early 2025 includes fee reductions, logistics subsidies, SME support, and agricultural merchant support.
extractions.evidence: The program includes: (1) RMB 10 billion fee reduction component with drastically reduced store security deposits, (2) logistics subsidies that reduced remote-area shipping costs and drove 40% order growth from remote regions, (3) RMB 1 billion in subsidies and RMB 2 billion in traffic support for premium produce initiatives, (4) expanded support for SMEs, new quality merchants, and branded merchants.

verification.verifier_notes: From PDD earnings calls Q1-Q3 2025 and Webull/ainvest reporting

extractions.claim: The 100B program caused significant margin compression: Q1 2025 operating profit fell to RMB 16.1B from RMB 26B, Q2 2025 operating profit fell 21% YoY.
extractions.evidence: In Q1 2025, operating profit fell to RMB 16.1 billion from RMB 26 billion in Q1 2024. In Q2 2025, operating profit fell to RMB 25.79 billion, a 21% drop, as costs of revenues spiked 36%. Management described this as a 'timing mismatch between when expenses are recorded and when the long term returns materialize.'

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD earnings releases, confirmed by investing.com transcripts

extractions.claim: PDD describes the 100B program as 'capital expenditure disguised as operating expense' - building intangible merchant loyalty assets not captured by accounting.
extractions.evidence: The program isn't a one-time marketing blitz - it's described as a capital expenditure disguised as an operating expense, building intangible assets that traditional accounting doesn't capture. PDD's cash reserves remain robust at RMB 387.1-423.8 billion providing flexibility to reinvest without dilution.

verification.verifier_notes: The 'capex disguised as opex' framing is from analyst commentary (BeyondSPX), not PDD management directly
